proof_lane.command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/rch_target_memory_residency_accounting_snapshot_contract CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_PROFILE_TEST_DEBUG=0 RUSTFLAGS='-D warnings -C debuginfo=0' cargo test -p asupersync --test memory_residency_accounting_snapshot_contract -- --nocapture
proof_lane.covers: Read-only hot/warm/cold/fallback/no-win accounting snapshot schema, deterministic row ordering, default-disabled behavior, stale/unknown fail-closed states, debug-server endpoint wiring, docs/artifact alignment, and no-local-Cargo proof command shape.
proof_lane.explicit_not_covered: Does not prove runtime correctness, throughput improvement, p999 improvement, allocator replacement, live-task migration, cache eviction behavior, broad workspace health, release readiness, or live RCH fleet availability.

consumers: runtime-inspector payload adapters that already carry schema-versioned JSON
no_claim_boundaries: No task drop, cancellation, migration, or allocator mutation.
No throughput, p999, memory reduction, NUMA win, cache hit-rate, or release-readiness claim.
No local Cargo fallback is approved for the focused proof.
Snapshot values are point-in-time observations, not a continuous control loop.
